zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Dacre於1260年出生在英國波藍德達可時，她的父親Ranulph Dacre15歲，母親Joan de Lucy25歲。她於大約1281年與Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1319年6月1日在英國英格蘭爾保斯托享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Dacre于1260年出生在英国波藍德達可时，她的父亲Ranulph Dacre15岁，母亲Joan de Lucy25岁。她于大约1281年与Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1319年6月1日在英国英格兰爾保斯托享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dacre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Dacre, one in Cumbria, the other in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Dacre was born in 1260, in Dacre, Cumberland, England, her father, Ranulph Dacre, was 15 and her mother, Joan de Lucy, was 25. She married Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook about 1281, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 1 June 1319, in Bostock, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Dacre est née en 1260, à Dacre, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Ranulph Dacre, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Joan de Lucy, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook environ 1281, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1319, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Dacre 1260 in Dacre, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ranulph Dacre 15 und ihre Mutter Joan de Lucy 25. Sie hat um 1281 in England, United Kingdom Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Juni 1319 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Bostock, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Dacre è nata il nel 1260 nel Dacre, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Ranulph Dacre, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Joan de Lucy, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook circa 1281, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 giugno 1319, nel Bostock, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Dacreが1260年にイギリスクウンバーランドダクアで生まれた時，父Ranulph Dacreは15歳，母Joan de Lucyは25歳であった。約1281年にイギリスイギリスでSir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrookと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1319年6月1日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアボストックで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Dacre(이)가 1260년 영국 c벌랜드 다크르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ranulph Dacre(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Lucy(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1281년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1319년 6월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 보스톡에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Prescot, Lancashire, England: Prescot, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Dacre nasceu em 1260, em Dacre, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ranulph Dacre, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Lucy, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook aproximadamente 1281, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1319, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Dacre родилась в 1260 г. в местности дакр, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Ranulph Dacre было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Lucy, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook около 1281 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 1 июня 1319 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Dacre nació en 1260, en Dacre, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Ranulph Dacre, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Joan de Lucy, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook aproximadamente 1281, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de junio de 1319, en Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
